last_commit_subject: chore: add dual MIT/Apache-2.0 license files

rust.notes: CLAUDE.md claims 56 crates; `crates/` actually has 52 crate dirs (53 entries incl. README.md). Workspace Cargo.toml lists 55 members incl. 3 tooling crates and tests/e2e.

surfaces: Builder web task editor (ReactFlow, dist/ shipped)

evidence: CHANGELOG.md exists; only 2 entries ([Unreleased] empty, [0.1.0] single bullet); version mismatch with workspace (CHANGELOG=0.1.0, Cargo=0.0.12)
6 workflows: ci, cargo-audit, cargo-deny, journey-gate, scorecard, trufflehog
.github/dependabot.yml covers cargo weekly; no swift/github-actions ecosystems
SECURITY.md with advisory flow + cargo-deny/CodeQL refs

candidates.use_case: Replace ad-hoc focus-events/ focus-sync-store pub-sub with canonical bus
Propagate request IDs across Rust crates + Swift FFI boundary for tracing
Consume shared icon set instead of building focus-icon-gen from scratch
Consolidate focus-observability + focus-telemetry + the relative path-dep on PhenoObservability into one local lib
Unify ConnectorRegistry / webhook-server / template-pack registries under one registry contract
Roll tooling/agent-orchestrator, tooling/bench-guard, tooling/release-cut under shared tooling lib
Wire the Swift journey-gate (XCUITest journeys already in apps/ios/FocalPoint/Tests/FocalPointJourneyTests) to phenotype-journeys
Expose Coachy state machine + ritual logic as phenotype skills

sota_gaps: Apple FamilyControls entitlement not yet approved (gates real-device enforcement; #if FOCALPOINT_HAS_FAMILYCONTROLS everywhere)
Zero onboarding screens (Users cannot self-serve setup today; Canvas button only)
Simulator-only QA (no real-device test matrix; entitlement required)
GCal + GitHub OAuth flows incomplete (buttons present, flows scaffolded only)
Coachy mascot Rive animation pending designer (SwiftUI placeholder in use)
No WidgetKit / Live Activities / Dynamic Island surface for focus sessions or streaks
No Apple Watch companion (referenced in design docs, not built)
No App Intents / Shortcuts integration (Siri 'Start Focus Session' missing)
No push notifications for rituals / sync (morning-brief, evening-shutdown are pull-only)
No iCloud / CloudKit sync (current sync is ad-hoc heartbeat only)
Localization limited to en + es + ja (no FR/DE/ZH/HI/PT-BR)
No TestFlight / App Store Connect distribution pipeline (no fastlane or equivalent)
No iPad / multi-window layout (iPhone-only SwiftUI shell)
Path-dep on sibling PhenoObservability is required for cargo build --workspace (fragile cross-repo coupling)
convergence_rationale: Rust core (52 crates) + Swift iOS/macOS shell (18 .swift files) + Go services (graphql-gateway, templates-registry) + TypeScript web surfaces (docs-site VitePress + Builder ReactFlow) + GraphQL gateway + MCP server (focus-mcp-server) + cargo-deny/audit/clippy toolchain. Touches at least 5 stacks.

action_items.title: Stabilize cargo workspace build & decouple from PhenoObservability path-dep
action_items.details: Verify `cargo build --workspace` is green on a fresh clone with no adjacent PhenoObservability checkout. Vendor macros in-tree or publish a workspace-internal `focus-observability-macros` crate. Target: single-`git clone` builds.

action_items.title: Ship iOS onboarding flow (3-5 screens)
action_items.details: Self-serve setup: FamilyControls permission explainer, connector pair wizard (Canvas first), rule preset chooser, Coachy intro, daily schedule gate. Removes 'Canvas button only' blocker from README.

action_items.title: Complete GCal + GitHub OAuth flows end-to-end
action_items.details: Both connectors are scaffold-only. Wire ASWebAuthenticationSession callback, keychain persistence, event list sync, and connector-runtime dispatch. Mirror the Canvas connector (44 wiremock tests) as the pattern.

action_items.title: Add WidgetKit + Live Activities for focus sessions & streaks
action_items.details: Lock-screen Live Activity for active focus session timer + Dynamic Island compact/expanded. Home-screen WidgetKit for streak, today's rule status, evening-shutdown countdown. Pure additive; no entitlement blocker.

action_items.title: Apply Apple FamilyControls entitlement & unblock real-device QA
action_items.details: Submit/complete FamilyControls entitlement review, drop #if FOCALPOINT_HAS_FAMILYCONTROLS guard, build TestFlight pipeline (fastlane or xcodebuild distribute), and run an iOS 17+ / iPhone 15 device matrix.

notes: Source-of-truth crate count: `ls crates/` = 52; workspace Cargo.toml members = 55 (incl. 3 tooling/* + tests/e2e). CLAUDE.md '56 crates' is stale.
Workspace package version 0.0.12 vs CHANGELOG 0.1.0 vs README status banner v0.0.5 — three different version numbers in the repo.
build*/ folders under apps/ios/FocalPoint/ are leftover artifacts; not gitignored (see apps/ios/.gitignore check recommended).
AGENTS.md exists at repo root but is project-level (macOS Focus app), diverging from Cargo-workspace reality; consider refreshing.
